title: Clinic Management System
desc: Complete cloud-based electronic health records, scheduling, and billing solution for modern clinics.
details: This enterprise platform streamlines medical practice workflows. It features live online booking, HIPAA-compliant patient charting, automated SMS reminders, and built-in insurance claim processing.

title: Smart POS System
desc: Offline-first cloud point of sale system with inventory forecasting and multi-store analytics.
details: A hybrid mobile/web POS designed for retail stores and busy restaurants. Operates seamlessly offline and automatically syncs data when connected, backed by rich forecasting algorithms.

title: Delivery Platform
desc: Real-time driver dispatching, route optimization, and live package tracking for delivery networks.
details: An end-to-end logistics platform consisting of a dispatch panel, driver apps, and a customer tracking interface. Solves last-mile routing challenges efficiently.

title: Bilingual Chatbot (Arabic/English)
desc: AI assistant utilizing LLMs to automate customer queries in conversational Arabic and English.
details: Built to handle dialects (including Iraqi Arabic) and English queries, resolving up to 80% of customer support requests without human agent intervention.

title: Enterprise ERP Portal
desc: An integrated suite for human resources, procurement, payroll, and asset management.
details: A comprehensive enterprise resource planning dashboard built to handle complex financial calculations, approval workflows, and employee performance tracking.

title: Warehouse Management System
desc: Barcode-scanning web app for managing inbound and outbound stock control dynamically.
details: Optimizes warehouse operations by introducing barcode verification, stock location mapping, and real-time inventory adjustments.
